allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ha=[v for k,v in d.get\('mcpServers',{}\).items\(\) if 'home' in k.lower\(\) or 'hass' in k.lower\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(ha, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ha={k:v for k,v in d.get\('mcpServers',{}\).items\(\) if 'home' in k.lower\(\) or 'hass' in k.lower\(\)}; print\(json.dumps\(ha, indent=2\)\)")
